AUTH.SUBTITLE: Your next smart destination awaits.

HERO.TITLE: Explore the world with artificial intelligence
HERO.SUBTITLE: Our cutting-edge AI analyzes thousands of destinations to offer you the ultimate personalized experience, from perfect weather to the planet's most exclusive hidden gems.

FEATURES.PERSONALIZATION_DESC: Our neural network learns from your past preferences and future desires to curate destinations that resonate with your identity.
FEATURES.SAVINGS_DESC: Predictive algorithms that find the exact moment to book, maximizing your budget without compromising on luxury.
FEATURES.STRESS_FREE_DESC: Dynamic itineraries that adjust in real-time based on weather, traffic, and availability, so you only worry about enjoying yourself.

INFO.TRAVELER_DESC: Join the elite travelers who use AI to design unforgettable adventures.
INFO.PROVIDER_DESC: Reach the perfect travelers through our predictive recommendation engine.

ACCESSIBILITY.TITLE: Accessibility Settings
ACCESSIBILITY.DESCRIPTION: Customize your navigation experience to perfectly suit your visual and operational needs.
ACCESSIBILITY.PREVIEW_TEXT: Here you can see a font size preview
ACCESSIBILITY.HIGH_CONTRAST_DESC: Maximize visual readability by increasing color contrast.
ACCESSIBILITY.REDUCE_MOTION_DESC: Disables smooth animations and complex transition effects.
ACCESSIBILITY.SCREEN_READER_DESC: Speech output optimization for NVDA and VoiceOver.
ACCESSIBILITY.TEXT_SPACING_DESC: Allows you to modify the spacing of lines, letters, and words.
ACCESSIBILITY.HIGH_CONTRAST_45_DESC: Activates a high contrast mode where text meets a minimum ratio of 4.5:1.
ACCESSIBILITY.BORDER_CONTRAST_DESC: Increases the border contrast of controls, icons, and graphics to at least 3:1.
ACCESSIBILITY.TOOLTIPS_MENUS_DESC: Allows you to dismiss them without moving the keyboard focus.
ACCESSIBILITY.PAUSE_MOTION_DESC: Allows you to pause, stop, or hide content like carousels or updates.
ACCESSIBILITY.DISABLE_FLASHING_DESC: Disables or reduces elements that flash more than 3 times per second.
ACCESSIBILITY.FOCUS_INDICATOR_DESC: Activates a clear visual indicator for keyboard focus using :focus styles.
ACCESSIBILITY.DISABLE_SINGLE_KEY_DESC: Allows you to configure, remap, or disable single-key keyboard shortcuts.
ACCESSIBILITY.PAUSE_AUTO_AUDIO_DESC: Shows a control to pause or mute automatic audio.
ACCESSIBILITY.TEXT_TRANSCRIPTS_DESC: Activates the display of text transcripts for audio or video.
ACCESSIBILITY.SYNC_CAPTIONS_DESC: Activates the display of synchronized captions in videos.
ACCESSIBILITY.AUDIO_DESCRIPTION_DESC: Activates the audio description track in pre-recorded videos.
ACCESSIBILITY.REALTIME_CAPTIONS_DESC: Activates the real-time captions feature for live broadcasts.
